data.name: Mindweaver Chronicles
data.detailed_description: Mindweaver Chronicles is an adult point-and-click adventure game. In the not-so-distant future, a young woman joins a mysterious organization to navigate her way through a crime-ridden city, using a newly acquired ability: the power to transform into the deepest sexual desire of others.
data.about_the_game: Mindweaver Chronicles is an adult point-and-click adventure game. In the not-so-distant future, a young woman joins a mysterious organization to navigate her way through a crime-ridden city, using a newly acquired ability: the power to transform into the deepest sexual desire of others.
data.short_description: A classic point & click adventure with a spicy twist! Love old-school games? Enjoy solving puzzles? Don’t mind a little adult mischief? Then buckle up—because in this game, you'll interact with quirky characters, crack clever challenges, and indulge in some steamy encounters.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2GHz Dual Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Video card with at least 512MB Shared VRAM & openGL 2.0 support
  • 儲存空間: 1200 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any Windows-compatible sound card
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.6 GHz Dual Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Video card with at least 512MB Shared VRAM & openGL 2.0 support
  • 儲存空間: 1200 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any Windows-compatible sound card
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS 10.7
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core CPU, both Apple Silicon or Intel
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Video card with at least 512MB Shared VRAM & openGL 2.0 support
  • 儲存空間: 1200 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS 11
  • 處理器: 2.6 GHz Dual Core CPU, both Apple Silicon or Intel
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Video card with at least 512MB Shared VRAM & openGL 2.0 support
  • 儲存空間: 1200 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: 2GHz Dual Core CPU
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Video card with at least 512MB Shared VRAM & openGL 2.0 support
  • Storage: 1200 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Any Windows-compatible sound card
  • Additional Notes: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
